## Checklist

- [ ] Skill behavior tested manually (dry-run at minimum)
- [ ] SKILL.md and README updated if CLI flags, options, or behavior changed
- [ ] No new external dependencies added
- [ ] `state.json` backward compatibility preserved — new fields are optional with safe defaults
- [ ] Version bumped in `plugin.json` + `marketplace.json` (if this is a feature or behavior change)
- [ ] ROADMAP.md updated if item was listed there
